prose:
Water frontier-orbital analysis via DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz, treated as a fixed geometry (single point, not optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 7 cycles. The HOMO–LUMO gap (headline result) is 8.9406687 eV. HOMO energy: −8.6037183 eV. LUMO energy: +0.33695037 eV. Total electronic energy: −76.462901 Hartree. No warnings reported. All integrity checks passed; result is trustworthy. Exact four-center integrals used (no density fitting). Command: `chemkit frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
